title: Marketplace
description: Buy and sell everything with a fresh new villager trading system for a more sustainable living experience. Download modules for modded support!
body:
![downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fconnorcode.com%2Fapi%2Fdownloads%3Fmodrinth%3D4QhqQRkD%26curseforge%3D1104333&query=%24%5B%27total-human%27%5D&label=downloads&style=for-the-badge&color=0dc362)

Marketplace is a simple and vanilla friendly mod inspired by the Minecraft Bedrock Marketplace and the well known Essentials and Vault plugins. Unlike most other store-like modifications, this one requires you to collect and give the items (by right-clicking) to an unemployed villager to unlock trading these exact items. This mechanic makes it so you still need to explore Minecraft fully, as intended by the gameplay designers, while cutting off the physical grind required for those who prefer to just relax and build.

**NOTE:** This mod recently got revamped as a datapack and only a few items are currently supported for trading. This modification works in a manner that supports something recognized by this datapack as a module. A module is an individual tag-like compatibility datapack for supporting specific mods.
